steering.rationale: Replace placeholder with observable directed scenario and monitor hardening proof

goals.title: MCTP verification hardening: implement items 1-6 requested by user fo...
goals.objective: MCTP verification hardening: implement items 1-6 requested by user for mctp_assembler_scratch. 1 run all 26 directed scenarios with DUT-observed cocotb/e2e evidence; 2 add SRAM payload-only/no-hole/no-header monitor; 3 add AXI write/read protocol monitor; 4 add APB per-Q register readback test; 5 classify survived mutants and reduce where practical; 6 add optional safety property/formal artifact. Use TDD RED->GREEN evidence, tmux manual QA artifacts, no RTL integer/function/task/for/while/always_ff/always_comb, do not change SSOT/golden truth to hide failures.

successCriteria.scenario: happy path for: MCTP verification hardening: implement items 1-6 requested by user for mctp_a...
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Replace via revise_criterion with observable happy-path proof for goal 1.
